methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $10M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Robotics & Manufacturing (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 12 same-sector peers exist in Robotics & Manufacturing, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Foundation Robotics
private.rationale: Same sector (Robotics & Manufacturing), post-money $3B+ (reported, raise in progress)

data.narrative:
Diode is a Seed-stage robotics and manufacturing company founded by Davide Asnaghi and Lenny Khazan that has raised $10M+. The target sector includes 9 private peers (1X Technologies, Foundation Robotics, Divergent, Exotec, Locus Robotics among others) and 1 public comparable (277810.KQ), though direct peer benchmarking at this stage and within the narrow cohort proved insufficiently populated for reliable median analysis.

Given the sparse peer set at Seed stage in Robotics & Manufacturing, valuation relies on stage-progression methodology. Using total capital raised ($10M) as a proxy baseline and applying a 2.5x step-up multiplier typical for Seed-to-next-stage advancement yields an implied valuation of $25M. This method anchors the analysis to capital efficiency and expected venture return profiles for robotics companies advancing beyond seed funding.

The triangulated range supports a valuation of $21M–$29M, with a median of $25M. This reflects the single applicable methodology and should be treated as preliminary pending access to a broader or tighter peer set. Key uncertainties include: absence of product-market fit metrics, burn rate and runway duration, and the substantial heterogeneity within the Robotics & Manufacturing sector itself. Validation would benefit from revenue trajectory data or comparative margins once available.
